headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -105.4)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 124% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 177 quotes and an overwhelming 140 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• The frustration score of 91.1 sits in the middle-high range for the past 2 months, while optimism crashed to near its 61-day low.

• Frustrations jumped significantly from yesterday's 63.8, while optimism plummeted from positive territory to deeply negative.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
